name: sidebar
description: Sidebar — an ambient panel of AI agents that works alongside you in a live meeting. Built on Cerebras + Gemma 4.

scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n server,web -c green,cyan "bun run dev:server" "bun run dev:web"
scripts.host: bun run build && bun run start
scripts.typecheck: node --max-old-space-size=8192 node_modules/typescript/bin/tsc --noEmit -p packages/shared && node --max-old-space-size=8192 node_modules/typescript/bin/tsc --noEmit -p apps/server && node --max-old-space-size=8192 node_modules/typescript/bin/tsc --noEmit -p apps/web
